provider: Ollama (local, on contributor's M5 Max MacBook)
notes: Final submission uses 100% local inference via Ollama running Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct (unsloth UD-Q4_K_XL quant) on Apple Silicon. No paid API access. During earlier exploration we briefly tested three free-tier cloud providers (Featherless 3-day trial, NVIDIA NIM free tier, Cerebras Cloud free tier); all three are timestamped in agent_logs/human_interventions.log for full transparency, and none of them remain wired in the submitted agent code. Architectural inspiration drawn from the publicly leaked Claude Code source (March 2026); no Claude Code files ship in this repo, every line under agent/ was written by us.
